description: Niche-specific hook strategies for finance, fitness, food, beauty, gaming, education

rules.title: Finance: Fear + FOMO Hook Dominates
rules.description: Finance content hooks on loss aversion ('You're losing $X every day you don't know this') outperform gain-framing by 2.7x. Fear of missing out + specific dollar amount = immediate scroll stop. Regulatory note: avoid explicit promises of returns.

recommendation.hook_template: You're losing $X every [period] you don't know this

rules.title: Fitness: Transformation Proof First
rules.description: Show the result (body transformation, weight, performance metric) in the first 2 seconds before explaining how. Fitness hooks with visible proof get 3.1x more saves. 'How I [achievement] in [timeframe]' is the top format.

rules.title: Food: Sensory ASMR Hook
rules.description: Food content with high-quality sensory audio (sizzle, crunch, pour) in the first frame retains 58% more viewers at 5s mark. Close-up macro shot of texture + sound = the most scroll-stopping food hook. No voiceover needed in first 3s.

rules.title: Beauty: Glow-Up Reveal Format
rules.description: Beauty content that opens with the before state and teases the after gets 2.4x higher completion than tutorial-first format. 'Watch me transform from [relatable bad state] to [aspirational state]' drives saves and shares.

rules.title: Gaming: Rage/Hype Clip as Hook
rules.description: Gaming content that opens with the peak moment (clutch play, fail, rage quit) then rewinds to context outperforms story-order content 3.4x on TikTok. Viewers need the dopamine trigger first. Best under 30s.

rules.title: Education: Myth-Busting Opens the Loop
rules.description: 'Everything you know about [topic] is wrong' hooks have 89% higher click-through for educational content. Challenges existing belief → creates cognitive dissonance → forces completion. Must deliver genuine insight or trust is permanently lost.

recommendation.hook_template: Everything you know about [X] is wrong

rules.title: Lifestyle: Identity Hook Drives Follow
rules.description: 'If you [identity marker], this is for you' hooks have the highest follow-conversion rate of any lifestyle format (avg 4.2% new follower rate per viral view). Viewers self-select → higher relevance signal → better algorithm targeting.

recommendation.hook_template: If you [identity], this is for you

rules.title: Tech: Shock Value Comparison Hook
rules.description: Tech product reveals that open with price vs value contrast ('$X gadget that replaced $3000 of equipment') get 4.1x more shares than feature-led hooks. The shock of value proposition stops scroll instantly.
